name: Green Bean and Turkey Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10.75 oz Can cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. In a medium saucepan, combine turkey, green beans, soup, and milk; stir well over medium heat until hot. Remove from heat and add cheese, stirring until melted. Pour into an ungreased 2-quart casserole dish and top with prepared mashed potatoes.
2. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes. Sprinkle with onions and bake an additional 3 to 5 minutes or until bubbly and onions are warm.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
430 Calories, 24 g Fat, 1150 Sodium
